name: Gulf Coast Ultra Deep Royalty Trust
business: The Royalty Trust holds a 5% gross overriding royalty interest in future production from specified exploration prospects in the Gulf of Mexico and onshore South Louisiana. It receives royalty payments from the grantor (HOGA) and distributes cash to unitholders after expenses. The trust does not conduct any active business or sell products; its sole assets are the overriding royalty interests.

exposures.sentence: The Royalty Trust was created to hold a 5% gross overriding royalty interest (collectively, the overriding royalty interests) in future production from each of McMoRan’s Inboard Lower Tertiary/Cretaceous exploration prospects located in the shallow waters of the Gulf of Mexico and onshore in South Louisiana that existed as of December 5, 2012, the date of the merger agreement (collectively, the subject interests).

catalysts.event: New well spudded on onshore Highlander subject interest
catalysts.sentence: HOGA previously informed the Trustee that a new well on the onshore Highlander subject interest was spudded on January 30, 2025 and recently reported that the well had reached total depth of 30,862 feet on February 17, 2026; however, the future production status of this well remains unknown.

catalysts.event: New well reached total depth on onshore Highlander subject interest
catalysts.sentence: HOGA previously informed the Trustee that a new well on the onshore Highlander subject interest was spudded on January 30, 2025 and recently reported that the well had reached total depth of 30,862 feet on February 17, 2026; however, the future production status of this well remains unknown.
